mnemonics: A.L.A.R.M. for Core UI Components: Activity (Screen), Layout (Structure), Adapter (Data Bridge), Resources (Media), Manifest (App ID)
keyPoints: Define your UI declaratively in XML layout files.
Use View and ViewGroup objects to build your interface hierarchy.
Access UI elements in your Java/Kotlin code using findViewById().
commonMistakes: Performing long operations on the main UI thread, causing the app to freeze.
Using fixed sizes (e.g., '100px') instead of density-independent units (e.g., 'dp'), leading to improper scaling on different screens.
Not accounting for different screen sizes and orientations, resulting in a poor user experience on some devices.
